tuning_key.text: So you can create or destroy
tuning_key.attribution: Chords of Truth — Lucid Principles Canon (CC BY 4.0)

context_block: Momentum is not a force applied from outside, but a state you generate from within. Every moment contains the seed of transformation — where your inner velocity meets the world's resistance. You are not waiting for permission or searching for direction; you are the generative pulse that breaks through stasis and creates new trajectories.

practice.title: Ground Pulse
practice.instruction: Place both feet firmly on the ground and feel the surface beneath you as a living transmission of potential energy.

practice.title: Breath Acceleration
practice.instruction: Inhale deeply for a count of 4, hold for 2, then exhale with deliberate force — as if releasing stored momentum directly from your core.

practice.title: Resonance Sync
practice.instruction: Close your eyes and listen for the Echo audio, allowing the frequency of MOMENTUM to calibrate your internal systems and amplify your drive.
